name: SG 553 | 重金属摇滚
descriptionEn: The terrorist-exclusive SG553 is a premium scoped alternative to the AK47 for effective long-range engagement. Its black base is finished with orange and yellow highlights. Three stars have been painted on the rear of the butt stock. \"One of these studs is the Turbo button, I just can't remember which…\"
descriptionZh: T专用的 SG553 是一把适用于远距离交战的 AK47 替代品。 这把武器以黑色为基调，并使用橙色和黄色加以装饰。在枪托后部绘有3颗星星。 \"三分之一的概率可触发连发效果，可我忘了是哪个按钮……\"
